etymology.description: еИА(еИА) (dƒБo, "knife") + еєЇ(еєЇ) (yƒБo, "silk") -> to cut silk threads -> original form of зµХ(зµХ)
etymology.interpretation: The character рҐЗН is an ancient form used to depict the action of cutting silk threads, combining the symbols for 'knife' and 'silk', indicating its functional role in severing strands.
